Pro-grade Android smartphone thermal camera module with 256x192 IR resolution and dual measurement modes for both elevated body temperature and industrial inspection. Plugs into Type-C, ships with a 1m extension cable.
Compact handheld thermal camera aimed at HVAC, electrical, and DIY troubleshooting. IP65 rated with 2 m drop durability, 5 color palettes, and on-board 16 GB microSD storage.

Tripod-mountable thermal camera dedicated to elevated body temperature (EBT) screening at 30 to 45 degC with +/-0.5 degC accuracy. Real-time PC software streaming with auto high-temp alarm makes it suitable for clinic, school, and entrance screening.
